title: loaded-dice config
description: Configuration schema for the loaded-dice Claude Code plugin

session_model.description: Model selection mode: 'auto' lets loaded-dice decide, or specify a tier name

confidence_threshold.description: Minimum classification confidence to act on (0.0–1.0)

default_tier.description: Fallback tier when classification is inconclusive

bypass_prefix.description: Prefix character(s) that bypass routing entirely

session_timeout_minutes.description: Minutes of inactivity before session momentum resets

momentum_decay_after.description: Number of same-tier calls before momentum decays

suggest_switch_after.description: Consecutive off-tier prompts before suggesting a switch

llm_fallback.description: Fall back to LLM classification when keyword/pattern matching is inconclusive

tierConfig.description: Routing config for a single model tier

mode.description: Merge strategy when combining with parent config

keywords.description: Exact-match keywords that route to this tier

patterns.description: Regex patterns that route to this tier

remove_keywords.description: Keywords to remove from the merged keyword list (extend mode only)

remove_patterns.description: Patterns to remove from the merged pattern list (extend mode only)

max_word_count.description: Prompts under this word count are candidates for this tier (haiku)

force_min_word_count.description: Prompts over this word count are forced to this tier (opus)
